items.briefing:
Ransomware attacks are increasing in frequency, though not primarily due to AI — cybercriminals are simply refining existing methods and moving faster. Australian organisations, including training providers, should treat this as a timely reminder that no sector is immune. Separately, a malware campaign is currently targeting users in Portugal; while not directly aimed at Australia, similar phishing-based tactics are regularly used here, so staff should remain cautious with unexpected emails and attachments.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email urging you to open a file or click a link — even if it looks legitimate — verify directly with the sender before acting.

featured.title: ATO tax debts lift insolvency risk for Australian firms
featured.quote: ATO debts threaten 35,000+ Australian businesses with insolvency, creating systemic economic risk.
